message:
fix: replace syscall.Flock with cross-platform lock.FlockAcquire in namepool.go (gt-b17k)

Use the existing internal/lock package which has proper build tags
(flock_unix.go / flock_windows.go) instead of raw syscall.Flock calls
that are undefined on Windows. Fixes Windows cross-compile failure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
